reasoning: The base rate for modern US political assassination attempts involving a lone actor is extremely high (85-95%). All available evidence points to Tyler Robinson acting alone: Representative Knott, who reviewed the evidence, stated that Robinson appeared to be acting by himself; the NYPD issued a bulletin warning of "lone suspect" violence; and Robinson fits the typical behavioral profile of a lone actor (described as quiet and shy). While there are minor uncertainties regarding his online chats, no evidence of co-conspirators has emerged, and his partner is cooperating. Even if no definitive law enforcement statement is issued before the October 31 deadline, the market will resolve based on what law enforcement believes is most likely, which currently overwhelmingly favors the lone actor hypothesis.
batch_queries: Fact check: Was Tyler Robinson a lone actor?
